steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student's goal is to indicate the size of the Pilot Knob NWR. The only note that gives size information is: 'It encompasses 90 acres.' The correct choice must include that specific figure.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'The Pilot Knob NWR is a protected natural area managed by the US Fish & Wildlife Service, which limits human activities there.': covers management and access restrictions — no acreage. ✗
  • Choice B — 'The Pilot Knob NWR is a natural area in Missouri, home to the Indiana bat.': gives location and a species — no acreage. ✗
  • Choice C — 'Home to the Indiana bat, Missouri's Pilot Knob NWR is managed by the US Fish & Wildlife Service.': covers species and management — no acreage. ✗
  • Choice D — 'A protected natural area, the Pilot Knob NWR encompasses 90 acres of land in Missouri.': directly states the 90-acre size. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
